div1.entryFree: Operation, agency, effect: a good sherris-sack hath a twofold o. in it, H4B IV, 3, 104. hath an o. more divine, Troil. III, 3, 203. Rom. III, 1, 8. Lr. I, 1, 113. Ant. II, 7, 30. IV, 15, 26. Used confusedly by Nym: I have --s which be humours of revenge, Wiv. I, 3, 98 (== disposition, sentiments).
